findings.description: No export-to-issue functionality found. The AI Code Review modal allows starting a review with a custom prompt, model selection (claude-haiku-4-5), and effort level (Low/Med/High), but there is no option to export review findings as a GitHub issue.
findings.expected: Option to export code review findings as GitHub issues
findings.actual: AI Code Review modal has Start Review and Cancel buttons only; no export-to-issue option
